Name: departments_aggregate
SQL: WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" WHERE "public"."departments"."budget" >= $1::numeric AND "public"."departments"."budget" <= $2::numeric) SELECT json_build_object('aggregate', (SELECT json_build_object('count', COUNT(*), 'avg', json_build_object('budget', AVG("budget"))) FROM "_root.base")) AS "departments_aggregate"
